data.body: Implemented: all tickets/origin/tickets/HEAD:tickets branch literals across init/sync/push/reconciler(_concurrency,_advisory_lock)/reads/fsck now resolve via config.tickets_branch(). Tracker-only callers resolve from the main repo (tracker parent dir) per the _sync_disabled/_push_mode precedent; best-effort paths swallow ConfigError, init+reconciler propagate. Subagent review: clean, ship as-is. 1111 tests pass; custom-branch smoke test confirms auto-push lands on the configured remote branch + fsck reports it. Default 'tickets' behavior byte-for-byte unchanged.
